name: SBI Aurum Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Spend ₹10,00,000 or more in the previous year

categoryRates.description: 20X Reward Points on dining and travel partner transactions (20 RP per ₹100)
5 Reward Points per ₹100 on all other transactions

redemptionOptions: Premium gift vouchers from SBI Card catalogue
Travel bookings via SBI Card portal

welcomeBenefits.condition: On spending ₹15,000 within 60 days of card issuance

milestoneBenefits.benefit: Additional e-gift voucher worth ₹10,000 + annual fee waiver

additionalBenefits: Unlimited domestic and international airport lounge access via Priority Pass
Travel insurance with ₹1 crore emergency medical cover
Purchase protection of ₹5 lakh for 120 days
Complimentary golf rounds at select courses
Buy 1 Get 1 on movie tickets via BookMyShow
pros: 5% base reward rate (5 RP/₹100 at ₹1 per point) is exceptional for everyday spends
20X rewards on dining and travel partners gives an effective 20% return
Unlimited domestic and international lounge access via Priority Pass
Comprehensive insurance: ₹2 Cr air accident, ₹1 Cr travel, ₹5 L purchase protection
Welcome benefit of ₹10,000 more than covers the joining fee
cons: Very high income eligibility of ₹30 lakh limits accessibility
₹10 lakh annual spend needed for fee waiver is demanding
₹9,999 annual fee is steep if you cannot hit milestone benefits
Reward exclusions on fuel, rent, and wallet loading reduce earning potential
idealFor: High-income individuals seeking a super-premium card with unlimited lounge access
Frequent travelers who want comprehensive insurance and low forex markup
Luxury spenders who dine out often and want the best possible reward rates

faqs.question: Is the lounge access really unlimited?
faqs.answer: Yes, the SBI Aurum provides unlimited complimentary airport lounge visits — both domestic and international — through the Priority Pass network. There is no cap on the number of visits per year.

faqs.question: How much is each Reward Point worth?
faqs.answer: Each Reward Point is worth ₹1 when redeemed. With a base earn rate of 5 RP per ₹100, this gives an effective 5% return on all spends and up to 20% on partner dining and travel categories.

faqs.question: What insurance does the card provide?
faqs.answer: The card offers ₹2 crore air accident insurance, ₹1 crore emergency medical travel insurance, and ₹5 lakh purchase protection for 120 days from the date of purchase.

faqs.question: How does the welcome benefit work?
faqs.answer: You receive e-vouchers worth ₹10,000 when you spend ₹15,000 within 60 days of card issuance. This more than covers the ₹9,999 joining fee, making the first year effectively free.
